word: H6708 - צְחִיחִי - tsᵉchîychîy - tsekh-ee-khee' - Higher place

sections.paragraph:
Original: צחיחי o

Transliteration: tsechı̂ychı̂y

Phonetic: tsekh-ee-khee'

BDB Definition:

  1. shining or glaring surface, bare places

Origin: from H6706

TWOT entry: 1903b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
